overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through urban streets, makes a right turn at an intersection, and stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers. Windshield wipers are active throughout, and the dashboard displays are illuminated.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban arterial road approaching intersection

events.description: bus begins right turn at intersection with turn signal activated
navigating through intersection while yielding to oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: operating bus on wet roads, signaling and executing right turn at traffic intersection while monitoring mirrors

notable_agents.action: silver sedan waiting at the intersection to proceed straight
white car moving through the intersection ahead of the bus

entered.detail: dense row of green deciduous trees lining the left side of the street
multi-story beige apartment complex with uniform windows and balconies
tall metal pole with horizontal traffic signals at the upcoming intersection
bus driver instrument panel with illuminated gauges, speedometer, and GPS navigation screen

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a tree-lined urban boulevard during heavy rain, with windshield wipers sweeping across the glass. The driver approaches an intersection and executes a right turn, navigating around other vehicles while residential buildings pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with mixed traffic and parked vehicles

events.description: coming to stop at red traffic light at major intersection
proceeding through intersection as traffic light turns green
slowing down to prepare for upcoming bus stop approach

agents.ego_description: navigating through city traffic, stopping at red lights, and preparing for bus stop approach while monitoring road conditions

notable_agents.action: large blue truck overtaking the bus on the left side
red sedan parked along the right curb with hazard lights on

entered.detail: modern glass and concrete storefronts with ground-floor shops and upper offices
rectangular directional traffic sign mounted on metal pole
continuous line of parked vehicles along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a commercial street lined with shops and parked cars, stopping at a red traffic light before proceeding. The environment transitions from residential to commercial architecture, with various vehicles sharing the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop zone with passenger shelter and convenience store

events.description: coming to complete stop at designated bus stop curb
bus doors opening to allow waiting passengers to board

agents.ego_description: pulling up to the designated bus stop and stopping to pick up waiting passengers in the rain

notable_agents.action: group of people standing under the bus shelter waiting to board the bus
person holding a bicycle standing near the bus stop sign

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels, metal frame, and illuminated interior
small retail shop with bright interior lighting and product displays in windows
red and white beverage vending machine on the sidewalk near the shelter

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a bus stop where several people are waiting under a shelter. The driver brings the vehicle to a smooth stop at the curb, and the doors open to allow passengers to board. A convenience store with illuminated windows is visible behind the waiting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked city, moving from a residential boulevard toward a commercial boarding area. It begins with the bus driving along a tree-lined street under heavy rain, with windshield wipers sweeping across the glass as the vehicle executes a right turn past residential buildings. As the bus proceeds, the environment shifts from residential to a commercial district lined with shops and parked cars, pausing briefly at a red traffic light amidst other vehicles on the wet road. The scene then transitions toward a bus stop where passengers wait under a shelter, with the illuminated windows of a convenience store visible in the background. Finally, the camera settles as the bus brings the vehicle to a smooth stop at the curb and the doors open for the waiting passengers.
